summary: Recent MSc Cybersecurity graduate (NCI Dublin, 2:1) with CEH and CAP certifications. Nokia and Government of India Hall of Fame recognition for responsible vulnerability disclosure. Hands-on experience with Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, Nmap, and Kali Linux through academic projects and independent security research. Published cybersecurity blog on Medium. Authorised to work in Ireland (Stamp 1G).

experience.title: Independent Security Researcher
highlights: Nokia Hall of Fame — identified and responsibly disclosed a security vulnerability in Nokia's platform
Government of India Hall of Fame — responsible vulnerability disclosure recognised by CERT-In / NIC
Published cybersecurity blog on Medium documenting penetration testing methodologies and AI security research
Built AI-powered penetration testing home lab using Penligent AI and DVWA
experience.note: Independent security research and responsible disclosure

projects.name: AI-Powered Penetration Testing Home Lab

projects.name: ISO 27001 Gap Assessment Template

projects.name: Risk Assessment Framework for SMEs
projects.description: Structured Risk Assessment Framework for SMEs incorporating DORA and NIS2 compliance requirements for Irish financial and critical infrastructure sectors
